item.title: Stablecoin Dry Powder Is Not Yet Returning at Scale “Continued reserve contraction would leave rallies more dependent on leverage and external capital flows.” – By @NovaqueResearch
item.description: pStablecoin Dry Powder Is Not Yet Returning at Scalebr /br /“Continued reserve contraction would leave rallies more dependent on leverage and external capital flows.” – By a href="https://nitter.net/NovaqueResearch" title="Novaque Research"@NovaqueResearch/a/pimg src="https://nitter.net/pic/media%2F

item.title: Reminder Scientists just discover a way to help the Brain & Spinal cord repair themselves 👀 Researchers built a miniature human brain-spinal cord model using stem cell-derived organoids to study why d
item.description: pReminderbr /br /Scientists just discover a way to help the Brain & Spinal cord repair themselves 👀br /br /Researchers built a miniature human brain-spinal cord model using stem cell-derived organoids to study why damaged nerve cells stop repairing themselves.br /br /The team discovered that a genet

item.title: 🚨 BIG NEWS: Scientists just created Schrödinger-Like quantum states using only 6 molecules. Today's computers are built from billions of transistors. Tomorrow's quantum technologies might be built fro
item.description: p🚨 BIG NEWS: Scientists just created Schrödinger-Like quantum states using only 6 molecules.br /br /Today's computers are built from billions of transistors.br /br /Tomorrow's quantum technologies might be built from just a handful of molecules 👀br /br /"Researchers built a tiny 6-molecule cluster w

item.title: R to @SciTechera: Every new mathematical discovery expands the frontier of science. AI is starting to accelerate that frontier itself 👽👀"
item.description: pEvery new mathematical discovery expands the frontier of science. br /br /AI is starting to accelerate that frontier itself 👽👀"/p

item.title: We cannot simulate AI security research
item.description: pspanWe use AI agents not only for writing but also for maintaining and deploying code. The most widespread examples are found in GitHub Actions Marketplace, which contains over a thousand AI-assisted actions./spanspan class="footnote-reference" id="fnrefcklq2719jn"supa href="https://www.lesswrong.c

item.title: The real disruption isn't AI discovering new biology. It's AI compressing decades of biomedical research into days. Dr. Derya Unutmaz says AI is rapidly becoming a scientific co-researcher, not just a
item.description: pThe real disruption isn't AI discovering new biology. It's AI compressing decades of biomedical research into days.br /br /Dr. Derya Unutmaz says AI is rapidly becoming a scientific co-researcher, not just a chatbot.br /br /Rather than spending months analyzing massive biological datasets, research
